t_ch: {NICKNAME}，还记得那个小跟班吗？使命完成，它回去了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, you remember that sidekick? It left after its mission was accomplished.

t_ch: 不过，它用自己账户里全部的信用点，在星际互联网络帮模拟宇宙发布了「招募合伙人」的消息。它说愿赌服输，虽然不能透露工作内容，但可以换种形式。
t_en: Still, it spent all the credits in its account to post a "Collaborator Recruitment" advert on the Interastral Network for the Simulated Universe. It said although it couldn't disclose the exact details of the job, it can honor the bet in a different way.

t_ch: 我没想到，如今一个小小机器人的「自由意志」…也会发展到这种程度。
t_en: I'm surprised by how developed the... "free will" of a robot is nowadays.

t_ch: 「欢迎你，{NICKNAME}。斯蒂芬让我一定要给你详细介绍一下『自定义骰』。」黑塔似乎不想解释太多，「他说『自定义骰』乃是一名智械的孕育之壳。你可以将『感情』、『思维』、『记忆』、『魅力』等物附着于它。」
t_en: "Welcome, {NICKNAME}. Stephen asked me to give you a thorough breakdown of those 'custom dice'." Herta doesn't seem to be in the mood to explain much. "According to him, the die is actually a shell of an Intellitron, and you can attach your emotions, thoughts, memories, and charms to it."

t_ch: 所以这骰子是个智械？
t_en: So, this die is an Intellitron?

t_ch: 「不知道。」黑塔耸了耸肩，「玩就是了，也许它什么时候会冒出自由意志吧。」
t_en: "I don't know." Herta shrugs. "Just enjoy it, and maybe it'll develop its own free will someday."

t_ch: 不就是个拼装骰子嘛……
t_en: It's just a customizable die...

t_ch: 「嗯，是这样。」黑塔说，「玩就是了，有什么反馈就给斯蒂芬。」
t_en: "Yeah, that's it," Herta replies. "Just enjoy it and give your feedback to Stephen."

t_ch: 「加油，继续前进吧，{NICKNAME}。」黑塔说完，把画面关掉了。
t_en: "Keep going, {NICKNAME}." Herta says, turning the screen off.

t_ch: 我产生了新的困惑…
t_en: I have some new points of confusion...

t_ch: 嗯？
t_en: Hm?

t_ch: 关于「寰宇蝗灾」…
t_en: About the Swarm Disaster...

t_ch: 有什么疑惑？
t_en: What kind of questions do you have?

t_ch: 我要怎么得知「繁育」的秘密？
t_en: How will I learn of Propagation's secrets?

t_ch: 践行「行者之道」，走在各位前路人已踏好的行迹上，努力接近星神！不用担心，按自己的性子去践行命途就行。
t_en: Continue along the Trail of Pathstrider, and walk along the traces already paved by those who came before you, and try your hardest to get closer to the Aeons! Don't worry! Just carry out the Paths in the way you want to.

t_ch: 我还有别的问题…
t_en: I still have some questions...

t_ch: 关于「黄金与机械」…
t_en: About Gold and Gears...

t_ch: 有什么疑惑？
t_en: What kind of questions do you have?

t_ch: 我要怎么得知「智识」的秘密？
t_en: How will I learn of Erudition's secrets?

t_ch: 嗯，好问题。时刻注意自己的「自我认知」，防止自己变成机器人，或者全然丧失理性。不用想太多，反正你总会走到祂的计算之下。
t_en: Hmm, good question. Pay close attention to your Intra-Cognition at all times to prevent yourself from becoming a robot or totally losing your rationality. Don't think too much. You'll eventually end up following THEIR calculations anyways.

t_ch: 我还有别的问题…
t_en: I still have some questions...

t_ch: 嘎！
t_en: Quack!

t_ch: 你骰运不行。
t_en: The dice is not with you.

t_ch: 你骰运很棒！
t_en: You're quite good with the dice!

t_ch: 转圈圈！
t_en: Time to twirl!

t_ch: 编队功能已经可以自由使用了，一动不动的下载装置，现在只想做条晒太阳的咸鱼。
t_en: The team lineup function can be used freely now. The Downloader can now lie back and be a freeloader.

t_ch: 零分！
t_en: Zero points!

t_ch: 你遇到了黑塔的人偶，在模拟宇宙里遇到她的人偶实体，你还是有些惊讶。
t_en: To your surprise, you run into a physical Herta puppet in the Simulated Universe.

t_ch: 「你可以拿你的<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>，跟我换点东西。」黑塔毫不客气，「别那么看着我，我是怕你手里的钱太多，花不完。不过我估计，你也没那个本事。」
t_en: "You can use your <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color> to buy things from me," Herta proposes bluntly. "Don't stare at me like that. I'm just worried you might have too much money to know what to do with. But I reckon you're not good enough to get THAT rich."

t_ch: 你遇到了黑塔，她漫不经心，面无表情地看着你。
t_en: You encounter Herta. Uncaring, she looks at you expressionlessly.

t_ch: 「恭喜你啊，来到这里真不容易。」黑塔敷衍地应付，「如果你有多余的<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>，可以在我这里全部用掉，强化你的祝福。不然也没机会用了。」
t_en: "Congratulations. Well done on getting here." Herta responds carelessly. "You can use up all your <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color> here to enhance your Blessings. You won't get another chance to use them otherwise."

t_ch: 打开强化界面。
t_en: Open the Enhance screen.

t_ch: 下次吧。
t_en: Maybe next time.

t_ch: 黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她仍秉持不屑一顾的态度。
t_en: Once again, Herta's puppet appears in front of a store, still maintaining a dismissive demeanor.

t_ch: 「这种商店该由斯蒂芬看管，可惜他不愿露面。我把藏品使用权限都为你打开了，不错吧？」黑塔叉腰，「得拿<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>来换，这是基础游戏规则。」
t_en: "Stephen should manage stores like this, but he refuses to make an appearance. I've given you permission to use all the exhibits here. Isn't it great?" With her arms on her waist, Herta continues, "You still have to exchange them with <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color>, though. That's a basic rule of the game."

t_ch: 打开奇物商店。
t_en: Open the Curio Store.

t_ch: 离开。
t_en: Leave.

t_ch: 你惊讶地在商店门口发现螺丝咕姆的实体——能在模拟宇宙中遇见此位机械贵族，已足够令人荣幸。
t_en: To your surprise, you notice Screwllum's physical body at the entrance of the store. It is an utmost honor to meet the mechanical aristocrat in the Simulated Universe.

t_ch: 「黑塔女士因事务繁杂，邀请我一并处理。」螺丝咕姆十分平易近人，「{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，由我暂为您带来更多『祝福』。」
t_en: "Madam Herta, overwhelmed with work, invited me to assist her." Screwllum is very amiable and says, "{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, as of now, allow me to bring you more 'Blessings' on her behalf."

t_ch: 打开祝福商店。
t_en: Open the Blessing Store.

t_ch: 离开。
t_en: Leave.

t_ch: 黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她对自己捅的篓子毫不在乎。
t_en: Herta's physical puppet once again appears before the store's doors. She doesn't care about her own mistakes at all.

t_ch: 「这么多奇物冒出来，总有些你用不着的垃圾。」黑塔叉腰，「感恩戴德吧，这次你可以选择回收一些奇物，跟我换些祝福。」
t_en: "With this many Curios popping out, there will always be trash you can't use." Herta put her hands on her hips. "Be thankful. You can choose to recycle some Curios this time and swap for Blessings with me."

t_ch: 打开奇物回收商店。
t_en: Open the Curio Recycling Store.

t_ch: 离开。
t_en: Leave.

t_ch: 你惊讶地在商店门口发现螺丝咕姆的投影——他正悉心研究模拟宇宙中出现的异常现象。
t_en: You are surprised to find Screwllum's projection before the store's doors — He is immersed in studying the abnormal phenomena occurring in the Simulated Universe.

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我仍在研究此刻发生的代码膨胀。」螺丝咕姆气质彬彬，向你鞠了一躬，「结论：由我暂为您带来更多『祝福』。」
t_en: "{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, I am still investigating the code expansion happening right now." Screwllum gracefully bows to you. "Conclusion: For now, allow me to bring you more 'Blessings.'"

t_ch: 打开祝福商店。
t_en: Open the Blessing Store.

t_ch: 离开。
t_en: Leave.

t_ch: 黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她似乎对代班有些厌倦了。
t_en: Herta's physical puppet once again appears before the store's doors. She seems a bit sick of sitting in for someone else.

t_ch: 「毫不意外，斯蒂芬把捅的篓子丢给我了。」黑塔叉腰，「他说『变强』是游戏中的永恒乐趣之一…你看着办吧。」
t_en: "As expected, Stephen chucked his problems to me." Herta puts her hand on her hips. "He said 'growing strong' is one of the eternal joys in gaming... just do whatever you think will work."

t_ch: 强化祝福。
t_en: Enhance Blessing

t_ch: 离开。
t_en: Leave.

t_ch: 黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她手拿几枚画满「斯蒂芬•劳艾德戳记」的扑满手办。
t_en: Herta's physical puppet once again appears before the store's doors. She is holding a few Trotter figurines stamped all over with "Stephen Lloyd's seal'."

t_ch: 「嗯，不错的成绩，换点奖励吧。」黑塔十分敷衍。
t_en: "Hmm, not bad. Come get some rewards." Herta says perfunctorily.

t_ch: 打开祝福商店。
t_en: Open the Blessing Store.

t_ch: 离开。
t_en: Leave.

t_ch: 你惊讶地在商店门口发现螺丝咕姆——他正悉心研究一串公式。
t_en: Much to your surprise, you stumble upon Screwllum at the store entrance — he is utterly engrossed in studying a series of equations.

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我正在研究『等价交换』原则的起源。」螺丝咕姆气质彬彬，向你鞠了一躬，「尝试解析：奇物可与祝福进行等量的『数据兑换』。」
t_en: "{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, I am studying the origins of the equivalent exchange." Screwllum gracefully bows to you and says, "Analysis: Curios can be traded in equal amounts with Blessings via 'Data Exchange.'"

t_ch: 现在是黄昏时分，你站在热浪里。矿地令你一阵晕眩，矿脉烧得像融化的黄油。
t_en: It's dusk, and you're standing amid the heat waves. The atmosphere at the mines makes you dizzy, the mineral veins burning like melted butter.

t_ch: 「伟大的存护星神克里珀…祂能听到我们的声音。」矿工们举起铁锹又落下，他们像狂热动物，又像信徒。
t_en: "Great Qlipoth, Aeon of Preservation... THEY can hear our voices." The miners raise and dip their shovels like frenzied animals — or the faithful.

t_ch: 有人看到了你——戴着探测灯的*头号矿工*。他的臂膀黝黑健壮，嘴唇同样乌黑。他豪迈的笑容令人难忘。他镶了一颗金牙，在你脑海中不停放大、扭曲，最后你只看得到他的*笑容*——嘴唇和眼睛搅在一起，像调色盘里颜料融化。
t_en: Someone notices you — It's the "lead miner" wearing a detector lamp. His arms are dark and muscular, and his lips are in a similar shade of ink. His hearty smile is very memorable. He has a gold tooth that ceaselessly expands and twists in your brain, till all you can see is his "smile" — His lips and eyes fuse together, like the melting sludge of paint on a palette.

t_ch: 「琥珀王的恩赐，『克里珀』存护这片地脉。你可以挑一个带走。」
t_en: "Qlipoth, the blessing of the Amber Lord, preserves these leylines. You can have one of them."

t_ch: 你从未见过如此富丽堂皇的图书馆，它没有屋顶，被笼罩在无垠的星夜穹顶之下。
t_en: You have never seen a library as opulent as this. Without a roof, it is enveloped by the boundless, starry sky.

t_ch: 穹顶圣洁的光辉，照耀楼梯上的杂书。你随手打开一本书，书页上布满斑驳的色块代码。
t_en: The sacred light from the firmament shines on the books scattered on the stairs. You open a random one to find the pages filled with patchy color block codes.

t_ch: 「多此一举的小家伙！别乱翻我的书！」头发花白的老人呵斥道。他向你走来，你看到他皱得发胀的皮肤。「你手里拿着的那本，*新伦蒂尼恩王国*的历史，我最得意的作品。」
t_en: "Hey, nosy kid! Don't touch my books!" An elderly man with white hair reprimands you. As he approaches, you notice his wrinkled and bloated skin. "What you're holding is the 'history of the kingdom of New Londinium,' my proudest work."

t_ch: 你记录历史？
t_en: You record history?

t_ch: 「虚构史学家，只创造历史。我创造新伦蒂尼恩王国的过去，联席总理完全没有察觉他们的王国建立在一段虚假的、从未发生过的历史上。」他说。
t_en: "History Fictionologists only create history. I have created the history of the kingdom of New Londinium, and the Prime Minister of the Commonwealth does not even realize that their kingdom is based on a fake history that has never taken place." He answers.

t_ch: 你编的？
t_en: You made up history?

t_ch: 「虚构史学家，只修改历史。很多时候，你只需要把两个主语出现的顺序互换。改变新伦蒂尼恩王国的过去，就是如此简单。」他说。
t_en: "History Fictionologists only amend history. More often than not, you can simply change the order of the subjects in a sentence. That was how easily the history of the kingdom of New Londinium was changed." He answers.

t_ch: 「我在星空图书馆呆了十个琥珀纪…独自一人！」虚构史学家来回踱步。「我创造悖论、谬误、自相矛盾和含糊不清的说辞。」
t_en: "I've been living at the Starry Library for ten Amber Eras... all by myself!" The History Fictionologist paces. "I concoct paradoxes, fallacies, and statements that are contradictory and vague."

t_ch: 你做过些什么多此一举的行为?
t_en: What kind of superfluous actions have you done?

t_ch: 你做过些什么绝妙的处理？
t_en: What kind of brilliant touches have you made?

t_ch: 「比如——巴维鲁的现代居民以为咕嘟的声音，是表达喜悦。事实上，我很抱歉，这种声音其实是脏话。我把脏话的含义改成喜悦，伟大之举。」
t_en: "For instance, the modern Bavirus inhabitants think that their gobbling sound is an expression of joy. Well, I'm sorry to say this sound is actually a vulgar term. I've given the sound a positive meaning, which is quite a brilliant move."

t_ch: 你为什么要这么做？
t_en: Why did you do that?
